issues.sample: I'm not entirely sure what is wrong with the car but I was sitting in my car waiting for an appointment for about an hour. I backed out of my parking space and found that there was a large puddle of gas where I was parked. I moved back into the parking space and stopped the car.

- VEHICLE IS GETTING 19MPG (MOSTLY HIGHWAY).  MPG ON CAR IS WELL BELOW PUBLISHED RANGE OF 22-31.  VW TELL ME THAT I WILL ONLY GET THE PUBLISHED MPG AFTER 9000 MILES!!  - CARPLAY SYSTEM IS NOT CONNECTING TO *ANY* APPLE IPHONE.  - INFOTAINMENT SYSTEM IS SOMETIMES NOT TURNING ON  -

On 04/24, I purchased 4 P235/40ZR18 Bridgestone Potenza Sport tires from Tire Rack. The tires have approx 15000 miles on them. I discovered the tires started to show approx 1/2 in cracks all around the tire where the tread transitions to the sidewall. This appears to be a safety

narrative.headline: What 2016 Volkswagen Golf R owners report most
narrative.summary: Across 12 owner complaints to NHTSA, the most reported area is Fuel/Propulsion System (17% of reports).
